## Description

<!-- Describe your changes in detail -->

## Type of Change

<!-- Mark with an `x` all the checkboxes that apply -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New icon (non-breaking change which adds an icon)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Test addition or update

## Checklist

<!-- Mark with an `x` all the checkboxes that apply -->

- [ ] I have run `pnpm run check` and all checks pass
- [ ] I have added/updated tests for my changes
- [ ] I have followed the commit convention (`feat(icons): ...`)
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have tested the changes in the demo app
